text:
Once upon an autumn time in the sleepy town of Willowbrook. There lived an owl named Oliver. He wasn'dOWN much, but he knew secrets. One night Owl watched stars through his owl sight. Then he thought of a secret door.

Old Mr. Jenkins knew. He'd stash goodies. One day Oliver heard rustling. He peered. There stood Bugs Bunny.

"BLOOP!" The rabbit hopPED.

Owl glided behind. "Don't!"

But Bugs snickered. "Like I dare?"

Just thenowl fell. Bugs had a carrot. Why? "Because you'll taste better than beans."

Owl shrugged. Bugs took-off.

Creepy noises. Owl heard. Maybe monsters? Nope. Owls. He followed owl moonlight.

The owl slept. Morning! Bugs hid in owls feathers.

"Why?" Owl sneaky.

"A feather?"

"Hmmm."

"You got smart."

"I know!"

Together. Owl flew!

Somehow Bugs missed. Owl found nothing
